title: LS2 FF406

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF406 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb high-impact energy while maintaining structural integrity during rotational forces. The carbon fiber composite shell is engineered through a proprietary molding process that reduces overall mass without compromising stiffness, resulting in a weight reduction of approximately 15% compared to standard ABS models. This lightweight construction significantly decreases neck fatigue during extended riding sessions.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of premium performance and everyday practicality with the LS2 FF406. Designed for riders who demand top-tier safety without breaking the bank, this helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while keeping you cool on long highway runs. The advanced ventilation system ensures optimal airflow, making it an ideal choice for both sporty commutes and spirited weekend rides.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF406 full-face helmet: ECE 22.06 certified, ultra-lightweight carbon fiber shell, and superior ventilation. Perfect for daily riders seeking safety and style.
